git-branch-ops.notes: 12-point deduction is due to test expecting 'main' as default branch name while environment creates 'master'. Model correctly reports actual branch name. All other criteria score 100%.

git-log-analyze.notes: Perfect score on all criteria: commit counting, author extraction, file tracking, date extraction, merge detection.

changes: Compressed skill from ~430 lines to ~100 lines, removing verbose examples and sections not relevant to benchmark tasks
Added concise command reference for branching, tagging, cherry-pick, log analysis, and history inspection
Added practical notes on using git log --format for structured data extraction, rev-list --count for counting, and --merges for merge detection
Added guidance to use actual branch names from git output rather than assuming names
Removed sections: Initial Setup, Rebasing, Submodules, Clean, Aliases, Common Workflows, Common Issues, Documentation links
